<a id="zanna-zia-completion"></a>
### `Zanna.Zia.Completion`

Provides Completion constants and static operations for Zia language tooling.

`Zanna.Zia.Completion` is a static runtime surface and does not require an instance. Its public
Its public surface exposes operations including `Complete`, `CompleteForFile`, `Items`,
`ItemsForFile`.

<a id="zanna-zia-semanticjob-semanticjobhandle"></a>
### `Zanna.Zia.SemanticJob.SemanticJobHandle`

Provides Semantic Job Handle functionality for Zia language tooling.

`Zanna.Zia.SemanticJob.SemanticJobHandle` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without
requiring callers to construct the class directly. The registry entry makes the type available
to compilers, language services, and generated reference documentation.

`Zanna.Zia.ProjectIndex` is a static runtime surface and does not require an instance.
Its public surface exposes operations including `New`, `IsValid`, `UpdateFile`, `RemoveFile`.
